title: Staff Backend Engineer, Active Journey Alliance
score_reasoning: Your seniority and growth trajectory align well with this Staff Backend Engineer role at a high-scale company, and the microservices, event-driven architecture, and observability focus directly match your 7 years of distributed systems work. However, you have a critical gap in Kubernetes—a core requirement explicitly mentioned multiple times—which the role lists as essential for 'production operations at scale,' and your event-driven architecture experience is limited to basic Kafka consumption, not the deep message-bus expertise the job requires. Additionally, the role is based in Warsaw with no explicit remote option mentioned, creating a substantial location mismatch from your Berlin base; the timezone is roughly +1h from Berlin, which is manageable, but the on-site or unclear hybrid setup anchored to Poland rather than your target regions (Europe/UK/Switzerland with Berlin as anchor) materially reduces fit. The company quality (HelloFresh—notable brand, strong product) and scale (6M+ customers) are strategic positives that make this viable as a stretch, but the Kubernetes gap and location ambiguity prevent a higher score.

red_flags: Kubernetes is listed as a core requirement ('Advanced experience with Docker, Kubernetes') but you have only basic Docker experience—this is a documented critical gap
Event-driven architecture expertise required goes beyond your Kafka consumer-only background; job explicitly requires 'building event-driven architectures' with message buses
Location is Warsaw, Poland with no explicit 'remote' or 'hybrid' designation; your preference is remote-first anchored to Berlin; this creates geographic and potential timezone uncertainty
NoSQL database expertise listed as 'deep expertise' is a documented gap in your profile; job requires 'relational and NoSQL' at advanced level
PHP listed as required language; no evidence in your Python/Go profile
